name: FTS Index
purpose: Server-side full-text index over the note corpus, hosted on Cloudflare D1.
responsibilities: Maintain an FTS5 index of note bodies and titles
Serve search queries with paged results
Re-index notes on change notifications from the Sync Worker
internalStructure: D1 schema with notes_fts virtual table; ingest worker subscribes to sync events.

interfaces.name: GET /search
interfaces.description: Returns paged search results for a free-text query.

tradeoffs: D1 FTS5 is good enough for the target corpus size; we accept the lack of multi-language stemming in v1.
